This can be obtained in your developer a: This can be obtained in your developer account from the<https://admindemo.docusign.com/authenticate?goTo=appsAndKeys|Apps and Keys> page. See the https://support.docusign.com/guides/ndse-admin-guide-api-and-keys|Docusign eSignature Admin Guide> for more information.
This is for the integration key you obta: This is for the integration key you obtained above and can also be created on the <https://admindemo.docusign.com/authenticate?goTo=appsAndKeys|Apps and Keys> page. You only need the private key, and it can only be copied once. Make sure to retain it for your records.
This is a GUID identifying the Docusign: This is a GUID identifying the Docusign user that you will be impersonating with the access token. Your own User ID can be found at the top of the<https://admindemo.docusign.com/authenticate?goTo=appsAndKeys|Apps and Keys> page
Comma-separated list of scopes. These re: Comma-separated list of scopes. These represent the OAuth scopes (permissions) that are being requested. For eSignature REST API methods, use the signature scope. The impersonation scope is implied by the JWT Grant operation and does not need to be included. If the access token will be used for other Docusign APIs, additional scopes may be required; see each API's <https://developers.docusign.com/docs/esign-rest-api/esign101/auth/|authentication> requirements
Get People on a Signing Request: Get People on a Signing Request
Find and list signing requests with opti: Find and list signing requests with optional filters like status, date range, or keyword.
Look up the full details of a signing re: Look up the full details of a signing request — status, recipients, and dates — using its ID.
Download a document (or all documents) f: Download a document (or all documents) from a signing request as a file.
Upload a document and send it to one or: Upload a document and send it to one or more people to sign via DocuSign.
Send a draft, cancel, resend reminders,: Send a draft, cancel, resend reminders, or edit the subject line on a signing request.
Search for reusable signing templates by: Search for reusable signing templates by name.
Get the full list of people on a signing: Get the full list of people on a signing request — signers, viewers, and anyone copied.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
The ID of the document to retrieve. Alte:
The ID of the document to retrieve. Alternatively, you can use one of the following special keywords:

combined: Retrieves all of the documents as a single PDF file. When the query parameter certificate is true, the certificate of completion is included in the PDF file. When the query parameter certificate is false, the certificate of completion is not included in the PDF file.
archive: Retrieves a ZIP archive that contains all of the PDF documents and the certificate of completion.
certificate: Retrieves only the certificate of completion as a PDF file.
portfolio: Retrieves the envelope documents as a PDF portfolio.
Subject line of the email sent to all re: Subject line of the email sent to all recipients.
Optional message body included in the si: Optional message body included in the signing request email.
Documents to include in the envelope.
Recipients who must sign the envelope.
Recipients who receive a copy of the com: Recipients who receive a copy of the completed envelope but do not sign.
Required when operation is \"Void Envelo: Required when operation is "Void Envelope". Explain why the envelope is being voided.
Required when operation is \"Update Emai: Required when operation is "Update Email Subject / Message". New subject line for the signing email.
Used when operation is \"Update Email Su: Used when operation is "Update Email Subject / Message". New body text for the signing email.
Full or partial name of the template to: Full or partial name of the template to search for.
Authorization headers are injected autom: 授权头自动从您的连接中注入。
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
HEAD: 黑色
Triggers when a new signing request (env: Triggers when a new signing request (envelope) is created in DocuSign — whether sent immediately or saved as a draft.
Triggers when a signing request is email: Triggers when a signing request is emailed out to recipients for the first time.
Triggers when every recipient has opened: Triggers when every recipient has opened and viewed the signing request at least once.
Triggers when everyone has completed the: Triggers when everyone has completed their signature and the document is fully signed.
Triggers when a recipient refuses to sig: Triggers when a recipient refuses to sign, stopping the signing process.
Triggers when the sender cancels an in-p: Triggers when the sender cancels an in-progress signing request before everyone has signed.
Triggers when DocuSign sends the signing: Triggers when DocuSign sends the signing email to a specific person.
Triggers when a specific person opens an: Triggers when a specific person opens and views the signing request.
Triggers when a specific person complete: Triggers when a specific person completes their signature on the document.
Triggers when a specific person refuses: Triggers when a specific person refuses to sign the document.
Triggers when a recipient fails the iden: Triggers when a recipient fails the identity verification step before signing.
